question: From these maps alone, what can be concluded about which crime type has higher overall rates across U.S. states?

options.A: Both types have similar overall levels across states
options.B: Property Crimes tend to have higher overall rates across states
options.C: Violent Crimes tend to have higher overall rates across states
options.D: It cannot be determined from these maps alone

explanation: Both maps reuse the same threshold scale, but their underlying distributions differ. This can make one map appear more intense simply because more states fall into the top bin. In the underlying data, Violent Crimes has the higher average value, so that is the only reliable conclusion.
